visual_description: A close‑up shows an older man with gray hair in a light gray suit, his face partially in shadow, looking off to the left. He turns his head slightly, revealing a serious expression, while the background is a dim, green‑tinted wall with a blurred red sign. The view widens to show the same man seated, with two other men standing behind him near a metal barred window, one in a dark jacket and the other partially visible.
